central_schemes.name: MGNREGS (MNREGA)
central_schemes.benefit: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year (Rs 220-350/day)
central_schemes.eligibility: Rural adult household members willing to do unskilled work

central_schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana
central_schemes.benefit: Collateral-free business loans: Shishu (Rs 50K), Kishore (Rs 5L), Tarun (Rs 10L)

central_schemes.name: PM SVANidhi
central_schemes.benefit: Working capital loans Rs 10K → Rs 20K → Rs 50K for street vendors

central_schemes.name: Startup India Seed Fund
central_schemes.benefit: Up to Rs 50 lakh for proof of concept + Rs 5 crore for further scaling

central_schemes.name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0
central_schemes.benefit: Free skill training + certification + Rs 8000 reward

central_schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: Government pays 25% of stipend (max Rs 1500/month) to apprentices

central_schemes.name: PM Employment Generation Programme
central_schemes.benefit: 35% (rural) / 25% (urban) subsidy on project cost for new units
central_schemes.eligibility: Any individual 18+ with Class 8 pass for projects > Rs 10 lakh

central_schemes.name: Rozgar Mela (PM's Employment Fair)
central_schemes.benefit: Government job appointment letters issued at mega fairs

central_schemes.name: Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana
central_schemes.benefit: 50% of average daily wages for 90 days during unemployment
central_schemes.eligibility: ESIC-insured workers who lost jobs involuntarily

central_schemes.name: Nai Manzil Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: Skill training + bridge education for school-dropout minority youth
central_schemes.eligibility: Minority community youth 17-35 years, school dropouts

central_schemes.name: USTTAD (Upgrading Skills)
central_schemes.benefit: Training in traditional arts/crafts for minority artisans

central_schemes.name: National Career Service Portal
central_schemes.benefit: Free job matching, career counselling, internships

central_schemes.name: PM Daksh (Skill Training for SC/OBC)
central_schemes.benefit: Free skill training with stipend for SC/OBC/EBC youth

central_schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
central_schemes.benefit: Free residential skill training + guaranteed placement

state_schemes.benefit_en: Rs 10 lakh seed fund + mentoring + co-working space for TN startups
state_schemes.benefit_hi: TN स्टार्टअप को ₹10 लाख सीड फंड + मेंटरिंग
state_schemes.eligibility: DPIIT-recognized startups operating in Tamil Nadu

state_schemes.name_en: Indira Gandhi Shehri Rojgar Guarantee Yojana
state_schemes.name_hi: इंदिरा गांधी शहरी रोजगार गारंटी योजना
state_schemes.benefit_en: 100 days guaranteed employment per year for urban families
state_schemes.benefit_hi: शहरी परिवारों को 100 दिन रोजगार की गारंटी

state_schemes.benefit_en: Online job portal + skill centres + career guidance for Delhi youth
state_schemes.benefit_hi: दिल्ली युवाओं के लिए ऑनलाइन जॉब पोर्टल + स्किल सेंटर

state_schemes.benefit_en: Rs 3,000/month (graduates) or Rs 1,500/month (diploma) for unemployed youth
state_schemes.eligibility: Karnataka unemployed youth (graduated within 2 years), age < 25

state_schemes.benefit_en: 25-35% subsidy on business loans for HP youth entrepreneurs
state_schemes.benefit_hi: HP युवा उद्यमियों को व्यावसायिक ऋण पर 25-35% सब्सिडी
state_schemes.eligibility: HP residents aged 18-45 starting new enterprises

state_schemes.benefit_en: 1 lakh youth to get skill training + tool kit + Rs 30,000 support
state_schemes.benefit_hi: 1 लाख युवाओं को कौशल प्रशिक्षण + टूल किट + ₹30,000
state_schemes.eligibility: Assam youth aged 18-40 from poor families

state_schemes.benefit_en: Employment guarantee + skill training for urban poor in Odisha
state_schemes.benefit_hi: ओडिशा शहरी गरीबों को रोजगार गारंटी + कौशल प्रशिक्षण

state_schemes.name_en: Annasaheb Patil Arthik Magas Vikas Mahamandal Loan
state_schemes.benefit_en: Low-interest loans up to Rs 10 lakh for OBC entrepreneurs
state_schemes.benefit_hi: OBC उद्यमियों को ₹10 लाख तक कम ब्याज ऋण
state_schemes.eligibility: Maharashtra OBC individuals with viable business plan

state_schemes.benefit_en: Employment registration, skill training, Rs 2,500-5,000 support

state_schemes.name_hi: ਘਰ ਘਰ ਰੋਜ਼ਗਾਰ / घर घर रोजगार पोर्टल
state_schemes.benefit_en: Job matching, career counselling, skill training for Punjab youth
state_schemes.benefit_hi: पंजाब युवाओं के लिए नौकरी मेच, करियर परामर्श

state_schemes.benefit_en: Incubation, seed fund up to Rs 10 lakh, mentoring for tech startups
state_schemes.benefit_hi: टेक स्टार्टअप को ₹10 लाख सीड फंड + मेंटरिंग

state_schemes.benefit_en: Rs 8,000-10,000/month stipend while learning skills at companies
state_schemes.eligibility: MP youth aged 18-29, Class 12 to graduate
